changeSet.author: auto
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS drive ( id INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, volumeSN VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT NULL, description VARCHAR(45) DEFAULT NULL, backup BIT(1) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (id), UNIQUE KEY volumeSN_UNIQUE (volumeSN) );

changeSet.author: auto
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS media_directory ( id INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, from_date DATE DEFAULT NULL, to_date DATE DEFAULT NULL, title VARCHAR(231) DEFAULT NULL, folder_name VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (id) );

changeSet.author: auto
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS image ( id INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, odid VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL, parent_id INT DEFAULT NULL, camera_make VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL, camera_model VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL, orientation INT DEFAULT NULL, date_taken VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT NULL, date_corrected VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT NULL, original_filename VARCHAR(45) DEFAULT NULL, original_file_hash VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT NULL, bestimate_filename VARCHAR(45) DEFAULT NULL, bestimate_file_hash VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT NULL, type VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT NULL, duration INT DEFAULT 0, latitude VARCHAR(45) DEFAULT NULL, longitude VARCHAR(45) DEFAULT NULL, altitude VARCHAR(45) DEFAULT NULL, credate DATETIME DEFAULT NULL, upddate DATETIME DEFAULT NULL, creator VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL, updater VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL, valid BIT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, title VARCHAR(511) DEFAULT NULL, keyword VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL, rating INT DEFAULT NULL, orig_exif BLOB, PRIMARY KEY (id), UNIQUE KEY id_UNIQUE (id), UNIQUE KEY ODID_UNIQUE (odid, type, valid), KEY ParentImage_idx (parent_id), CONSTRAINT parent_image FOREIGN KEY (parent_id) REFERENCES image (id) );

changeSet.author: auto
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS folder ( id INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, parent_id INT DEFAULT NULL, drive_id INT NOT NULL, path VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL, credate DATETIME DEFAULT NULL, upddate DATETIME DEFAULT NULL, creator VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL, updater VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL, actfold VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL, media_directory_id INT DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (id), UNIQUE KEY id_UNIQUE (id), UNIQUE KEY path_UNIQUE (drive_id, path), KEY drive_id_idx (drive_id), KEY folder_folder_idx (parent_id), KEY folder_path_idx (path), KEY folder_fk_media_directory_idx (media_directory_id), CONSTRAINT drive_id FOREIGN KEY (drive_id) REFERENCES drive (id), CONSTRAINT folder_folder FOREIGN KEY (parent_id) REFERENCES folder (id), CONSTRAINT folder_fk_media_directory FOREIGN KEY (media_directory_id) REFERENCES media_directory (id) );

changeSet.author: auto
changeSet.comment: H2: media_file table (without circular FK to media_file_version)
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS media_file ( id INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, main_id INT DEFAULT NULL, image_id INT DEFAULT NULL, shotnumber INT DEFAULT NULL, original_filename VARCHAR(256) DEFAULT NULL, title_in_filename VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL, file_type VARCHAR(5) DEFAULT NULL, standalone BIT(1) DEFAULT NULL, original_version_id INT DEFAULT NULL, media_directory_id INT DEFAULT NULL, credate DATETIME DEFAULT NULL, creator VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL, upddate DATETIME DEFAULT NULL, updater VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (id), UNIQUE KEY id_UNIQUE (id), KEY media_file_fk_image_idx (image_id), KEY media_file_fk_directory_idx (media_directory_id), KEY media_file_fk_main_idx (main_id), CONSTRAINT media_file_fk_image FOREIGN KEY (image_id) REFERENCES image (id), CONSTRAINT media_file_fk_directory FOREIGN KEY (media_directory_id) REFERENCES media_directory (id), CONSTRAINT media_file_fk_main FOREIGN KEY (main_id) REFERENCES media_file (id) );

changeSet.author: auto
changeSet.comment: H2: media_file_version table — one row per unique content hash
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS media_file_version ( id INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, filehash VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT NULL, file_type VARCHAR(5) DEFAULT NULL, commit VARCHAR(45) DEFAULT NULL, parent_id INT DEFAULT NULL, size BIGINT DEFAULT NULL, media_file_id INT DEFAULT NULL, standalone BIT(1) DEFAULT NULL, date_stored VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT NULL, date_stored_local DATETIME DEFAULT NULL, date_stored_utc DATETIME DEFAULT NULL, date_stored_tz VARCHAR(45) DEFAULT NULL, invalid TINYINT DEFAULT NULL, exifbackup BIT(1) DEFAULT NULL, credate DATETIME DEFAULT NULL, creator VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL, upddate DATETIME DEFAULT NULL, updater VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (id), UNIQUE KEY id_UNIQUE (id), UNIQUE KEY filehash_unique (filehash, file_type), KEY filehash_idx (filehash, file_type), KEY parent_fk_idx (parent_id), KEY media_file_version_fk_media_file_idx (media_file_id), CONSTRAINT media_file_version_fk_media_file FOREIGN KEY (media_file_id) REFERENCES media_file (id) );

changeSet.author: auto
changeSet.comment: H2: add original_version_id FK from media_file to media_file_version
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE media_file ADD KEY media_file_fk_original_version_idx (original_version_id), ADD CONSTRAINT media_file_fk_original_version FOREIGN KEY (original_version_id) REFERENCES media_file_version (id);

changeSet.author: auto
changeSet.comment: H2: media_file_instance table. FK to media_file_old is omitted (that table only exists during MySQL migration).
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS media_file_instance ( id INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, folder_id INT DEFAULT NULL, media_file_old_id INT DEFAULT NULL, filename VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, name_version INT DEFAULT 0, XMPattached BIT(1) DEFAULT NULL, date_mod DATETIME DEFAULT NULL, media_file_version_id INT DEFAULT NULL, media_file_id INT DEFAULT NULL, file_type VARCHAR(5) DEFAULT NULL, credate DATETIME DEFAULT NULL, creator VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL, upddate DATETIME DEFAULT NULL, updater VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (id), UNIQUE KEY id_UNIQUE (id), KEY fk_folder_idx (folder_id), KEY media_file_instance_fk_media_file_idx (media_file_id), KEY media_file_instance_fk_media_file_version_idx (media_file_version_id), CONSTRAINT fk_folder FOREIGN KEY (folder_id) REFERENCES folder (id), CONSTRAINT media_file_instance_fk_media_file FOREIGN KEY (media_file_id) REFERENCES media_file (id), CONSTRAINT media_file_instance_fk_media_file_version FOREIGN KEY (media_file_version_id) REFERENCES media_file_version (id) );

changeSet.author: auto
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS media_image ( id INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, media_file_version_id INT DEFAULT NULL, file_type VARCHAR(5) DEFAULT NULL, image_id INT DEFAULT NULL, exifbackup BIT(1) DEFAULT NULL, duration INT DEFAULT 0, latitude VARCHAR(45) DEFAULT NULL, longitude VARCHAR(45) DEFAULT NULL, altitude VARCHAR(45) DEFAULT NULL, orientation INT DEFAULT NULL, keyword VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL, rating INT DEFAULT NULL, title VARCHAR(511) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (id), KEY media_image_fk_media_file_version_idx (media_file_version_id), KEY media_image_fk_image_idx (image_id), CONSTRAINT media_image_fk_image FOREIGN KEY (image_id) REFERENCES image (id), CONSTRAINT media_image_fk_media_file_version FOREIGN KEY (media_file_version_id) REFERENCES media_file_version (id) );
